Now in public beta

Build a business
in 5 minutes.

Not just an app. A complete business — storefront, payments, inventory, marketing. All built, deployed, monitored, and self-healing.

You describe the idea. AI builds everything. It fixes itself while you sleep. You wake up to a growing business.

Start Building Free →See How It Works ↓

No credit card. Build your first project in under 5 minutes.

One file. Five minutes. Live business.

This is the exact file that built Bez Spinki — a real plus-size fashion store for the Polish market. Products, payments, inventory sync, size guides. All from this.

.powerhouse.yml
# Describe your business. That's it.
project: bez-spinki
description: "Polish plus-size fashion store"
stack: nextjs
market: PL

features:
  - shopify-checkout
  - blik-payments
  - size-guide-xl-6xl
  - inventory-sync
  - darmowa-dostawa

business_agents:
  merchandising: true   # Auto-monitors margins
  growth: true          # A/B tests, traffic alerts

monitoring:
  sentry: true
  phoenix: true
  autofix: true         # Sleep through bugs
That's the entire spec. Powerhouse builds the rest.
🛍️

Live Store

Next.js storefront, Polish UX, BLIK payments. Your domain.

📦

Inventory

Products synced from suppliers. Real stock. Real prices.

📊

Growth Engine

Margin monitoring, A/B testing, traffic anomaly detection.

🔧

Self-Healing

Bug at 3am? Fixed before you wake up. PR waiting for you.

How it actually works

1

You describe the idea

One YAML file. Or just type what you want. "A plus-size fashion store for Poland with BLIK payments."

2

Agent swarm builds it

Architect designs. Coder implements. Reviewer validates. DevOps deploys. They loop until it's perfect.

3

It runs itself

Merchandising agent watches margins. Growth agent runs A/B tests. Autofix daemon patches bugs at 3am.

Not just scaffolding.
Autonomous operations.

Every other tool stops at "here's your code." Powerhouse keeps working long after you close your laptop.

Agent Swarm

5 specialized agents work together. Architect → Coder → Reviewer → DevOps → Tester. They iterate until the Reviewer says PASS.

Deliberation Council

High-stakes actions require 5-agent approval. Hotfix deploy? Council votes. Rollback? Council rejects. No rogue automation.

Episodic Memory

Every decision remembered. Every error pattern learned. "Have we seen this bug before?" → Yes, here's what fixed it last time.

Business Agents

Merchandising agent watches your margins. Growth agent optimizes your conversion. Like having a team that never sleeps.

Model Router

Complex architecture → Claude Opus. Quick fixes → Llama (free). Saves 70% on API costs without sacrificing quality.

Self-Healing

Error detected at 3am → autofix daemon diagnoses → patches → opens PR → CI passes → merged. You wake up to "fixed while you slept."

Why not just use Bolt or Lovable?

They build an app. We build a business that runs itself.

CapabilityBoltLovablev0Powerhouse
Builds an app✅✅✅✅
Deploys it✅✅✅✅
CI/CD + monitoring❌❌❌✅
Self-healing❌❌❌✅
Agent swarms❌❌⚠️✅
Business agents❌❌❌✅
Open source❌❌❌✅ MIT

Your business, built in minutes.

No more spending weeks on boilerplate. Describe what you want. Our agent swarm builds, deploys, and runs it — while you focus on what matters.
